groupings.title: Get read, get found
groupings.description: Turn a repo visit into a user: a README that convinces in ten seconds and metadata that search actually ranks.

groupings.title: Document and deploy
groupings.description: Docs users can actually learn from: Diátaxis-shaped content with runnable examples, published on GitHub Pages by a pipeline that keeps it correct.

groupings.title: Welcome contributors
groupings.description: Community health files and structured intake that turn drive-by visitors into confident, low-friction contributors.

groupings.title: Protect and prove
groupings.description: Server-side protections and an evidence-backed audit that show the repo is professionally run - and keep it that way.
